name: ccx
description: Scratch-notebook context management for any project: per-thread STATE.md handoff docs with one-command create-or-resume (/ccx:start-thread), a compiled parallel-session-safe INDEX dashboard that recompiles itself on every STATE write (/ccx:save-state · /ccx:tidy-scratch), a Stop-hook freshness guard so working state is persisted before a session ends, plus a graph-backlink hook for Obsidian. Language-agnostic, no ticket system required.
